title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 07 2023
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 07 2023
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 07 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 07/09/2023
DCE iron ore futures declined by 1.88 % today, the main contract closed at 836.5. The traders' willingness to ship is high.The steel mills are active to purchase. The overall trading sentiment of the market is more.PBF at Shandong port deal 900 yuan/mt,decrease 16 yuan/ mt.
